name: French Onion Soup (Crock Pot)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, slowly sauté the onions in butter until they are limp and glazed.
2. Transfer the onions to the crock pot.
3. Add beef stock, white wine, sherry, Worcestershire sauce, and minced garlic.
4. Cover. Cook on low (200°F) for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Place French bread on a baking sheet. Sprinkle with cheese.
6. Place under preheated broiler until lightly toasted.
7. To serve, ladle soup into a bowl. Float a slice of toasted French bread on top.
